items.title:
From today, we’re doubling Claude Code’s 5-hour rate limits on Pro, Max, Team, seat-based Enterprise. 

We’re also getting rid of the peak-hour rate limit cut we made on Pro and Max a few weeks ago.

items.snippet:
Two attacks in two days. This is really bad. Disagree all you want on AI or any specific company, but violence like this is unacceptable. 

Hoping @sama and his family get through this okay, and that the temperature cools down asap. https://t.co/dYz0kfPHov
